message:
test(workflows): add tests for account_steps, engine; fix builtin_workflows Detection fields

- account_steps.rs: 27 tests covering parse_device_code (patterns, case
  insensitivity, error handling), validate_device_code (boundaries, invalid
  formats), DeviceCode equality/clone, error Display impls
- engine.rs: 39 tests covering WorkflowEngine, ExecutionStatus serde,
  WorkflowExecution serde, compute_next_step (empty/continue/done/retry/
  wait_for/abort/out-of-order), generate_workflow_id, now_ms,
  redact_text_for_log, step_error_code_from_result,
  redacted_step_result_for_logging, build_verification_refs
- builtin_workflows.rs: Fix Detection struct construction in tests
  (added missing confidence, span fields; changed extracted from
  HashMap::new() to serde_json::json!({}))

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
